'''kabodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oscillotonometer|oscillotonometer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-b-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oscillotonometer|oscillotonometer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kabodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæbedheth|kæbedheth]] || [[word:kæbedhej|kæbedhej]] || [[word:kæbedhesh|kæbedhesh]] || [[word:kæbedhe|kæbedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kabobodhoth|kabobodhoth]] || [[word:kabobodhoj|kabobodhoj]] || [[word:kabobodhosh|kabobodhosh]] || [[word:kabobodho|kabobodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kabodhoth|kabodhoth]] || [[word:kabodhoj|kabodhoj]] || [[word:kabodhosh|kabodhosh]] || [[word:kabodho|kabodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kabofdhoth|kabofdhoth]] || [[word:kabofdhoj|kabofdhoj]] || [[word:kabofdhosh|kabofdhosh]] || [[word:kabofdhof|kabofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kabodhotho|kabodhotho]] || [[word:kabodhojo|kabodhojo]] || [[word:kabodhosho|kabodhosho]] || [[word:kabodhoko|kabodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kabodhoth|kabodhoth]] || [[word:kabodhoj|kabodhoj]] || [[word:kabodhosh|kabodhosh]] || [[word:kabodho|kabodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kabodhothol|kabodhothol]] || [[word:kabodhojol|kabodhojol]] || [[word:kabodhoshol|kabodhoshol]] || [[word:kabodhokol|kabodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kabodhothotho|kabodhothotho]] || [[word:kabodhojojo|kabodhojojo]] || [[word:kabodhoshosho|kabodhoshosho]] || [[word:kabodhoko|kabodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kabodhothon|kabodhothon]] || [[word:kabodhojon|kabodhojon]] || [[word:kabodhoshon|kabodhoshon]] || [[word:kabodhokon|kabodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kabodhothoro|kabodhothoro]] || [[word:kabodhojoro|kabodhojoro]] || [[word:kabodhoshoro|kabodhoshoro]] || [[word:kabodhokoro|kabodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
